words.def: one skilled in caring for young children or the sick (usually under the supervision of a physician)
words.zh: n. 護士, 保姆, 奶媽

words.def: having or feeling no doubt or uncertainty; confident and assured
words.zh: a. 確信, 必然的, 必定的
n. 使用, 習慣, 使用價值, 用法, 使用權

words.def: a score in baseball made by a runner touching all four bases safely
words.zh: n. 跑, 賽跑, 奔跑, 奔跑的路程, 趨向, 流出, 運轉時間, 連續

words.def: the star that is the source of light and heat for the planets in the solar system
words.zh: n. 太陽, 日, 日光, 陽光
